[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101101 4
1 0010100 2
2 0100110 3
3 1111101 6
4 0101000 2
5 0000010 1
6 0100001 2
7 1110101 5

01 10 0100101 3
12 21 0000100 1
23 32 0000100 1
34 43 0100100 2
45 54 0101000 2 match 4
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 0100001 2 match 6

02 20 0010100 2 match 1
13 31 0100100 2
24 42 0010100 2 match 1
35 53 0100000 1
46 64 0000000 a
57 75 0100000 1
60 06 0000000 a
71 17 0100001 2 match 6

03 30 0100100 2
14 41 0101101 4 match 0
25 52 0000000 a
36 63 0000010 1 match 5
47 74 0100001 2 match 6
50 05 0100000 1
61 16 0000000 a
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 1110101 5 match 7
15 51 0101000 2 match 4
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0100000 1
[completion]

1 02 20 24 42
